source: Vasilije Simic Undecagon playbook — consistent 5-7x/week minimum for inbound funnel momentum

job_types.Educational: How-to guides, leak explanations, conversion principles
job_types.Testimonial: Before/after case studies, real founder results
job_types.Listicle: Tool comparisons, ranked lists, resource roundups
job_types.Comparison: Nebula vs competitors, self-serve vs sales-led, etc.

weekend_additions.hook: Spent $5K on Meta ads, got 0 conversions. Here's the one thing I changed.
weekend_additions.cta: Run the free audit on your own page: nebulacomponents.shop/audit

weekend_additions.hook: This week I audited 12 landing pages. 10 had the same CTA problem.
weekend_additions.cta: Might be on yours too. Run the audit: nebulacomponents.shop/audit

note: The 30-day calendar entries cycle through 5 job types. For 7x/week, use Saturday for Hook and Sunday for Teaser/data-drop posts. These are lighter formats suited for weekend mobile scrolling.
